nasb.text: For he not only accepted our appeal, but being himself very earnest, he has gone to you of his own accord.

esv.text: For he not only accepted our appeal, but being himself very earnest he is going to you of his own accord.

cnv.text: 提多一方面接受了勸勉，但他自己更加熱心，自願到你們那裡去。

ccb.text: 这固然是他听了我们的劝告，但也是他自己非常热诚，自愿去你们那里。

csbs.text: 提多一方面接受了我们的鼓励，另一方面自己更是殷勤，自愿到你们那里去。
